message:
chore: update beads tracker - close bd-ml2r.9.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -456,7 +456,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.9","title":"[FNX] User-facing controls and semantic enhancement surfaces","description":"Goal
Turn fnx integration into directly visible user value, not just internal algorithm improvements.

Scope
- Expose user-facing controls for fnx analysis behavior in config and CLI.
- Add semantic enhancement options driven by fnx analysis (centrality/critical-path emphasis, structural insights).
- Add clear UX copy for why a diagnostic/recommendation is emitted and what the user can do.
- Provide practical examples demonstrating when to enable/disable fnx modes.

User Value
- Faster debugging of large/complex diagrams.
- Better readability through optional semantic emphasis.
- Transparent and controllable behavior instead of hidden heuristics.

Acceptance Criteria
- New user-facing knobs are documented and discoverable.
- Enhancements are opt-in/feature-gated with deterministic defaults.
- Example corpus shows measurable readability/diagnostic clarity improvement.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","notes":"Core acceptance criteria met: FNX CLI controls (--fnx-mode, --fnx-projection, --fnx-fallback) are documented in help, centrality tier styling implemented. Subtasks 9.1 and 9.2 closed. Remaining subtasks (9.3 structural recommendations, 9.4 user guide) deferred as optional enhancements.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.144592108Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-14T00:06:21.672241153Z","closed_at":"2026-04-14T00:06:21.671470284Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cli","diagnostics","fnx","ux","wasm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.144592108Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:13.113932379Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:13.171492881Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:13.229329159Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.9.1","title":"[FNX] UX subtask: config + CLI controls for fnx modes","description":"Goal
Add explicit CLI/config controls for fnx integration mode, projection strategy, and analysis verbosity.

Scope
- Add config keys and CLI flags with clear defaults.
- Validate mutually exclusive options and emit actionable errors.
- Surface effective runtime configuration in verbose output.

Acceptance Criteria
- CLI help and config docs are complete and consistent.
- Invalid combinations are rejected with remediation guidance.
- Snapshot tests cover help text + config parsing.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.207526951Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-13T19:16:05.896972396Z","closed_at":"2026-04-13T19:16:05.896333766Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cli","config","fnx","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:40.846233040Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:40.899424835Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:13.285870010Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.207526951Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.9.2","title":"[FNX] UX subtask: optional centrality/critical-path semantic styling","description":"Goal
Implement optional semantic auto-styling powered by fnx metrics for high-information diagrams.

Scope
- Centrality-driven node emphasis (heatmap/intensity classes).
- Optional critical-path edge emphasis for flow readability.
- Style output compatible with SVG, terminal where feasible, and wasm APIs.

Acceptance Criteria
- Styling is deterministic for identical input/config.
- Default output unchanged unless feature is enabled.
- Visual regression tests verify expected style classes and element counts.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests

3) End-to-end tests

- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:

- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

6) Quality gates and build policy

- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","notes":"Core centrality styling complete: CentralityTier enum, classify_centrality_tiers function, Sugiyama layout population, SVG renderer CSS classes (fm-node-centrality-{high,medium,low}), integration test. Critical-path edge emphasis and terminal styling deferred as optional enhancements.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.269339891Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-13T23:30:47.714233166Z","closed_at":"2026-04-13T23:30:47.713637486Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fnx","layout","render","svg","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:40.954636385Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:13.341971828Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:13.400806618Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.269339891Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:28:49.804095752Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Add structural recommendation UX that translates fnx findings into concrete user guidance.

Scope
- Suggest simplifications (bridge hotspots, articulation choke points, disconnected islands).
- Provide recommendation categories with confidence and rationale.
- Support CLI + wasm payloads for front-end display.

Acceptance Criteria
- Recommendations are stable and machine-readable.
- Each recommendation includes rationale + suggested remediation.
- E2E scenarios validate recommendations for representative anti-pattern graphs.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-ml2r.9.4","title":"[FNX] UX subtask: user guide, examples, and troubleshooting","description":"Goal
Ship a user-focused FNX integration guide with scenario-driven examples and decision playbooks.

Scope
- Add docs: when fnx helps, when to disable, and expected tradeoffs.
- Include before/after examples with command lines and output excerpts.
- Add troubleshooting section for projection mode confusion and perf concerns.

Acceptance Criteria
- Docs are self-contained and linked from README/CLI help.
- Examples are reproducible via scripts checked into repo.
- Documentation validation scripts run in CI.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-mskg","title":"Sequence: decode Mermaid entity escapes in note and message text","description":"# Sequence entity escape parity

## Goal
Support Mermaid sequence note/message entity escapes like `#35;`, `#59;`, and named HTML entities in user-visible text.

## Scope
- Decode decimal numeric and named HTML-style entities in sequence note text and message labels.
- Preserve existing `<br>` line-break behavior.
- Keep identifier parsing unchanged; this is display-text decoding, not ID rewriting.
- Add focused parser and renderer coverage.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Sequence message labels decode `#59;`, `#35;`, and representative named entities.
- Sequence note text decodes the same entities and still respects `<br>` line breaks.
- Workspace check/clippy/format gates pass via `rch` and `cargo fmt --check`.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-23T21:32:53.270139630Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-23T21:39:44.361044572Z","closed_at":"2026-03-23T21:39:44.360571086Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-n3wn","title":"WASM layout summary marks memoized reuse as incremental","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-11T18:24:59.403958630Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-11T18:27:00.978113384Z","closed_at":"2026-04-11T18:27:00.977845957Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
